visual_description: A woman in a leopard‑print dress leans over a bed and pulls a sheet over a shirtless man lying on white linens. The scene then shows a man in a dark suit crouching in a dark outdoor area, followed by a bound man lying in a dirt pit surrounded by grass. Finally, a man in a white shirt is held by the woman in a dimly lit indoor setting.
